title: The Khaddar (Protection of Name) Act, 1950
full_text: The Khaddar (Protection of Name) Act, 1950 खद्दर (नाम संरक्षण) अधिनियम, 1950 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1950-78 Act Number: 78 Enactment Date: 1950-12-28 Act Year: 1950 Short Title: The Khaddar (Protection of Name) Act, 1950 Hindi Title: खद्दर (नाम संरक्षण) अधिनियम, 1950 Long Title: An Act to regulate the use of the words "Khaddar" and "Khadi" when applied as a trade description of woven materials. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 28-12-1950 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Khaddar (Protection of Name) Act, 1950 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. The words Khaddar and Khadi to be trade description Section 3. Repealed.
